ddls:
CREATE TABLE "brands" (
  "brand_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each brand */,
  "brand_name" TEXT /* Name of the product brand */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the brand (e.g., accounting software, healthcare equipment) */,
  "description" TEXT /* A brief description of the brand */,
  "website" TEXT /* Official website of the brand */,
  "founded_year" INTEGER /* Year the brand was founded */,
  "headquarters" TEXT /* Headquarters location of the brand */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("brand_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "strengths" (
  "strength_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each strength entry */,
  "brand_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the brand associated with the strength */,
  "strength" TEXT /* Description of the strength */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the strength information (e.g., customer review, industry report) */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date the strength information was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("strength_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_strengths_brand_id FOREIGN KEY ("brand_id") REFERENCES brands ("brand_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "weaknesses" (
  "weakness_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each weakness entry */,
  "brand_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the brand associated with the weakness */,
  "weakness" TEXT /* Description of the weakness */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the weakness information (e.g., customer review, industry report) */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date the weakness information was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("weakness_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_weaknesses_brand_id FOREIGN KEY ("brand_id") REFERENCES brands ("brand_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "opportunities" (
  "opportunity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each opportunity entry */,
  "brand_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the brand associated with the opportunity */,
  "opportunity" TEXT /* Description of the opportunity */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the opportunity information (e.g., market research, customer feedback) */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date the opportunity information was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("opportunity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_opportunities_brand_id FOREIGN KEY ("brand_id") REFERENCES brands ("brand_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "threats" (
  "threat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each threat entry */,
  "brand_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the brand associated with the threat */,
  "threat" TEXT /* Description of the threat */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the threat information (e.g., competitor analysis, industry report) */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date the threat information was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("threat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_threats_brand_id FOREIGN KEY ("brand_id") REFERENCES brands ("brand_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "swot_analysis" (
  "swot_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each SWOT analysis entry */,
  "brand_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the brand being analyzed */,
  "strengths_ids" TEXT /* Comma-separated IDs of strengths associated with the brand */,
  "weaknesses_ids" TEXT /* Comma-separated IDs of weaknesses associated with the brand */,
  "opportunities_ids" TEXT /* Comma-separated IDs of opportunities associated with the brand */,
  "threats_ids" TEXT /* Comma-separated IDs of threats associated with the brand */,
  "analysis_date" TEXT /* Date the SWOT analysis was performed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("swot_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_swot_analysis_brand_id FOREIGN KEY ("brand_id") REFERENCES brands ("brand_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., analyst, manager, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hash of the user's password */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "brand_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metric entry */,
  "brand_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the brand associated with the metric */,
  "metric_name" TEXT /* Name of the metric (e.g., customer satisfaction, market share) */,
  "metric_value" REAL /* Value of the metric */,
  "metric_date" TEXT /* Date the metric was recorded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_brand_metrics_brand_id FOREIGN KEY ("brand_id") REFERENCES brands ("brand_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "competitors" (
  "competitor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each competitor entry */,
  "brand_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the brand associated with the competitor */,
  "competitor_name" TEXT /* Name of the competitor */,
  "competitor_description" TEXT /* Description of the competitor */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("competitor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_competitors_brand_id FOREIGN KEY ("brand_id") REFERENCES brands ("brand_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "market_trends" (
  "trend_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trend entry */,
  "trend_name" TEXT /* Name of the trend */,
  "trend_description" TEXT /* Description of the trend */,
  "trend_date" TEXT /* Date the trend was identified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trend_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_brand_analyses" (
  "analysis_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analysis entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who performed the analysis */,
  "brand_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the brand being analyzed */,
  "analysis_date" TEXT /* Date the analysis was performed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analysis_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_brand_analyses_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_brand_analyses_brand_id FOREIGN KEY ("brand_id") REFERENCES brands ("brand_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analysis_comments" (
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comment entry */,
  "analysis_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the analysis being commented on */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who made the comment */,
  "comment" TEXT /* Text of the comment */,
  "comment_date" TEXT /* Date the comment was made */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analysis_comments_analysis_id FOREIGN KEY ("analysis_id") REFERENCES user_brand_analyses ("analysis_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analysis_comments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
